descriptions.text: Cinnamoroll FuwaFuwa Daisakusen is a Simulation game, developed and published by Rocket Company, which was released in Japan in 2005.

It is an action game in which Cinnamoroll explores multiple countries around the world collecting food and finding friends. It is very similar to its prequel, Cinnamoroll: Yume no Daibouken which was released on December 2nd of the previous same year.
